title: Gemma Playground: Parallel Agents in Action
summary: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma 4's ability to run 10 parallel independent agents on a single local machine, orchestrating work through a delegator and generating SVG art galleries at over 170 tokens per second. The demonstration covers local batch processing, concurrent multi-agent task delegation, and use cases for enterprise and private on-premises deployments.
writeup: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates running 10 parallel independent agents with Gemma 4 on a single local machine, with a delegator orchestrating the work and the agents generating SVG art galleries at over 170 tokens per second. The demo covers local batch processing, concurrent multi-agent task delegation, and use cases for enterprise and private on-premises deployments. The takeaway: multi-agent orchestration and concurrent inference can run locally rather than depending on hosted services, which matters for private and on-premises settings.
